message.content:
Review these newly created/modified files for bugs, missing imports, or logic errors. Focus on:
1. Import paths correctness
2. Prop passing between components
3. Missing dependencies in useCallback/useEffect
4. CSS class name consistency between JSX and CSS file

Files to check:
- C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\Onboarding\OnboardingWizard.jsx

Do NOT make any edits. Just report issues found.

content.text: I'll systematically read all the specified files to review them for bugs, missing imports, logic errors, and other issues.
